title: leonurus macranthus var. pseudomacranthus
intro: Leonurus macranthus var. pseudomacranthus, also known as Chinese motherwort, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve cardiovascular health due to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. Leonurus macranthus var. pseudomacranthus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
